nodes.name: Slap! Dodge! Grab!
nodes.description: This is the third title I had to develop for Whizzy Ants Digital. It was a rather simple project that emphasized on visual elements with simple gameplay. Nevertheless, it was a fun experience since it was the first time I had to work with non-humanoid animations. This was also available both on the Play Store and App Store but the company took them down for some reason.
